mapper.select:
SELECT i.id AS iceId, c.name AS customer, i.time AS time, i.number AS number, i.data AS data, i.total AS total, a.name AS account, p.name AS people, ii.id AS iceInfoId, ii.money AS money, -- 明细金额用 ice_info.money b.billIds AS iceBillId, -- 如果你要展示多个ID，用字符串承接 b.billMoney AS billMoney, et.name AS iet FROM ice i JOIN ice_info ii ON ii.pid = i.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pid, SUM(money) AS billMoney, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) AS billIds -- 可选 FROM ice_bill GROUP BY pid ) b ON b.pid = i.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = i.customer LEFT JOIN account a ON a.id = i.account LEFT JOIN people p ON p.id = i.people LEFT JOIN iet et ON et.id = ii.iet
AND i.id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY i.id, ii.id
